query_normalized: predicting the elastic moduli of 2d materials from first-principles calculations materials science
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (a) as it measures the same physical observable (elastic moduli) using the same methodology (first-principles/DFT) on the same domain (2D materials, specifically TMDs), providing the canonical ground-truth data required for a literature review on predicting these properties. It also meets criterion (b) by establishing the dependent variable values for the specific material class the user is investigating.
